ItacPersonItem.Notes: Former `accademico filomato`, Ugurgieri joined the Intronati in 1654, when the Filomati dissolved. He took the charge of `archintronato`. See Petracchi Costantini, L`Accademia degli Intronati di Siena e una sua commedia (1928).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
